Unifying ecosystems, empowering growth.
01
USDT0 expands the USDT standard to new ecosystems.
Core Concept
USDT0
ensures
fast, secure, and cost-efficient cross-chain transfers
all while maintaining a strict 1:1 backing with USDT.
"
USDT0
introduces a
much needed solution for seamless USDT movement across ecosystems.
By improving interoperability and reducing friction, it enhances the user experience in ways that align with the broader vision of Tether. It’s exciting to see this innovation emerge and tackle real market demand."
Paolo Ardoino, CEO of tether
"
USDT0 and Ink
share a commitment to
ensuring users and developers have maximum control over their assets
and the most seamless access to opportunities possible. USDT0 choosing Ink as its first chain is the beginning of a new standard for how stablecoin liquidity should flow across all chains in the future."
Andrew Koller, founder of Ink
"
USDT0 is one of the most exciting things we’ve seen in a very long time.
USDT is the single largest stable asset in the world and has enabled tens of billions of transfers and trillions in economic exchange, powering significant global economies and doing more to ‘bank the unbanked’ than any other group in the world."
Bryan Pellegrino, CEO and co-founder of LayerZero Labs

Core Concepts
Universal Composability
There is no need to manage liquidity pools or deploy custom bridge solutions; integrating USDT0 is as easy as integrating any other ERC-20 token.
Institutional Grade Security
All USDT0 is backed 1:1 with USDT on Ethereum. All transfers between chains are secured by LayerZero's interoperability protocol and attested to by USDT0 itself.
Future-Proof Expansion
USDT0 expands as the ecosystem grows, ensuring ongoing interoperability. It is ready to bring USDT to every premium blockchain.

FAQs
What is USDT0's mission?
We are standardizing how Tether assets expand to new blockchains. From USDT to XAUT, USDT0 is set on making Tether the de-facto asset issuer on every chain.
How do USDT0 Tokens work?
USDT0 is powered by the Layer Zero OFT standard and is directly connected to Tether redemptions on Ethereum. Here's how it works:

  1. Assets: USDT gets locked in a smart contract on Ethereum Mainnet.
  2. Issuance on Destination Chains: Equivalent USDT0 tokens are minted on the destination chain, reflecting the locked amount.
  3. Transfers: Users can move USDT0 across supported chains without worrying about liquidity, leveraging LayerZero.
  4. Redemption: USDT0 tokens can be redeemed by unlocking the corresponding USDT on Ethereum, from any supported chain, always maintaining a strict 1:1 backing.
What is the USDT0 Token?
USDT0 is how USDT gets to new chains, such as Ink, Berachain, and MegaETH. USDT0 is secure and omnichain.
Who can use USDT0?
USDT0 will debut on Ink, with additional rollouts planned for select networks, enhancing accessibility and usability for one of the most in-demand stablecoins in crypto. First-wave partners include Berachain and MegaETH, with more exciting announcements coming in the weeks ahead!

Once on a chain, USDT0 is available on both DeFi protocols and payment infrastructures alike!
